response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (this is a gaming livestream, not a song). 2. JSON Usage: Discarded song reference since it is a Minecraft stream. Manually transcribed and translated English commentary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles strictly timed to vocal bursts and conversational pauses. Included the prominent on-screen text overlay during her AFK period as per Trigger 2.

subtitles.original: Have I looked back at my 3D showcase? No. Past Ina is cringe.
subtitles.english: Have I looked back at my 3D showcase? No. Past Ina is cringe.

subtitles.original: Forget about Past Ina. Present Ina is where it's at.
subtitles.english: Forget about Past Ina. Present Ina is where it's at.

subtitles.original: What about Future Ina? Future Ina can take care of herself. It's fine, it's fine.
subtitles.english: What about Future Ina? Future Ina can take care of herself. It's fine, it's fine.

subtitles.original: Maybe we'll actually be able to afford... one coin. One coin...
subtitles.english: Maybe we'll actually be able to afford... one coin. One coin...

subtitles.original: I'm so sleepy today. I'm gonna sleep so well.
subtitles.english: I'm so sleepy today. I'm gonna sleep so well.

subtitles.original: I don't know if I'll stay awake until the end.
subtitles.english: I don't know if I'll stay awake until the end.

subtitles.original: Maybe I'll step away to eat for a bit, make some food.
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll step away to eat for a bit, make some food.

subtitles.original: Actually, I'll be right back. After this fish.
subtitles.english: Actually, I'll be right back. After this fish.
